description: Reusable definitions for fund.at funding metadata. Designed for use by fund.at.funding.manifest and any future record types or third-party integrations.

channel.description: A single payment channel where contributions can be made.

channelId.description: Slug identifier for this channel, unique within the manifest (e.g. 'github-sponsors', 'open-collective').

uri.description: The payment URL for this channel (e.g. https://github.com/sponsors/you).

plan.description: A funding plan or tier with a suggested amount.

planId.description: Slug identifier for this plan, unique within the manifest.

description.description: What this plan covers or how the funds are used.

amount.description: Suggested amount in the smallest currency unit (e.g. cents for USD). Use 0 for 'any amount'.

frequency.description: How often the plan is billed.

channels.description: Channel IDs where this plan can be fulfilled. If omitted, all channels apply.

channelRef.description: A reference to a channel by its ID.

channelId.description: The channelId of the referenced channel.
